text:
is the 27th chapter of the 2nd volume and the 54th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 Eren wakes up 2,000 years in the future, on a spaceship. 

Summary

A narrator explains how humanity was wiped out by Titans except for a small anti-Titan population called the "Wings of Liberty," which had successfully escaped into space and since then had been waiting for the perfect opportunity to counterattack.

Eren wakes up in a capsule on the Wings of Liberty's spaceship. He is frightened by everyone's appearance since they are all dressed in skintight spacesuits and demands to know where they are. Armin explains that he has slept for 2,000 years, and Mikasa asks if he remembers them. Eren recites everyone's names without fail, but stutters with Historia's, who has now transformed into a robot.

Now alone, Eren concludes that it is not a dream and that he must make an effort to adapt to the new environment. He begins asking Armin about a remote control, but he gives up, thinking that it sounds too complicated. Connie shows him how the remote works and presses a button on the device to display the news channel on screen. Afterward, Eren meets Mikasa in the hallway and points out that she is not wearing her scarf. He starts to doubt giving her a scarf when Mikasa wonders about what he meant. Suddenly, she tells him that she has it on her all the time and pulls out an electric heating pad from her spacesuit, disappointing Eren.

Eren asks Jean why he and the crew are dressed funny, and Jean explains that the suit is their organization's uniform. In turn, Jean comments on Eren's worn-out clothes. Later on, Eren dresses himself in the spacesuit and gets impressed by its comfortable fit. He soon starts to sweat and blames it on the room temperature, but Jean advises him to stop being stubborn and take his clothes underneath off.

Eren dislikes the food served on the spaceship. Sasha explains that it is their standard high-calorie plate with all the nutrients they need. Eren asks if they serve any bread or potatoes, and Sasha says that they do not have such luxuries. As Eren wallows in sorrow and eats his food, he wishes he could eat bread again, surprising Sasha by saying that he has tasted it before.

A Titan attacks the spaceship, and Eren is told to stay in his room. He watches the crew fight the Titan and he comments on their fighting abilities, coaching them indirectly to slice its neck. Historia hears this and corrects him, saying that cutting the Titan’s chest is the proper way to defeat it.

Connie, dressed in long sleeves, shorts, and a hat, knocks on a restroom door and tells Eren to hurry up because he has to use the restroom after him. Eren opens the door, still wearing the spacesuit, and congratulates the crew for doing an incredible job fighting the Titan. However, when he comes out, he is confused to find out that he has been transported back onto Earth.
